current_target_decision.reason: Deployer remains unresolved and GHOST decision is staged. Phase 3 rule blocks holder/LP/sellability/score progression for this target.

next_phase_selection_policy.continue_phase3: Use if there are more raw candidates requiring deployer-first evidence.
next_phase_selection_policy.close_phase3: Use if no new target should be processed now.

next_target_selection_plan.purpose: Select next generic candidate for deployer-first evidence pipeline without opening current GHOST target.

phase3_close_plan.purpose: Close current target route and summarize Phase 3 evidence status without selecting a new token.

ports.note: 8144 and 8145 are expected keep-open preview ports and are not hard errors.
